app.name: GeoNotes
auth.subtitle: No passwords. Sign in with a passkey.
auth.optionalHint: Optional: sign in to back up your notes and use them on other devices. Without an account, notes stay on this device only.
auth.noPasskeyFound: No passkey was found on this device. Create an account, or recover an existing one.
auth.createSubtitle: Confirm your e-mail, then create a passkey.
auth.recoverSubtitle: Enter your account e-mail. If an account exists for it, we'll send a 6-digit code to confirm it's you.
auth.codeSentTo: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
auth.codeSentToRecover: If you have an account with {email}, you will receive a 6-digit code. Enter it below to continue.
auth.error.badCode: That code is incorrect or expired. Please try again.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.error.passkeyNotRecognized: That passkey isn't linked to an account. Try again, or create a new account.
auth.switchAccountWarning: This device has notes from a different account. Signing in here will remove them from this device. They stay safe in that account.
auth.createDisplaceWarning: This device has notes from a different account. Creating a new account here will remove them from this device. They stay safe in the other account.
auth.signOutBody: Keep your notes on this device for offline use, or remove them? They stay in your account either way.
auth.signOutUnsyncedBody: Some notes haven't synced and aren't in your account yet. Keep them on this device, or remove them anyway and lose the unsynced ones?
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to keep syncing.
auth.signedOutRemotely: This device was signed out from another device, and its local notes were removed. They stay safe in your account.
gps.denied: Location access is required. Enable it in your browser settings and retry.
gps.timeout: Could not get a precise enough location. Move to a more open area and retry.
gps.waitingToAdd: Waiting for a precise location to add a note…
main.empty: No notes yet. Tap + to leave a note here.
editor.placeholder: Write your note… wrap words in ** to make them **bold**.
editor.deleteConfirm: Delete this note forever? This cannot be undone.
sync.offline: Offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
install.iosStep1: To install GeoNotes on your iPhone or iPad, tap the Share button
install.iosStep2: in the browser toolbar, then choose "Add to Home Screen."
settings.title: Settings
passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Passkeys let you sign in on this account without a password.
passkeys.removeConfirm: Remove this passkey? You won't be able to sign in with it anymore.
passkeys.lastError: This is your only passkey, so it can't be removed. Add another first.
sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to this account.
sessions.revokeConfirm: Sign out this session? That device will need to sign in again.
sessions.revokeOthersConfirm: Sign out every other device? You'll stay signed in here.
email.title: Account e-mail
email.codeSent: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
email.inUse: That address is already used by another account.
email.sameAddress: That is already your current e-mail address.
account.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all your notes.
account.deleteConfirm: Your account and all your notes will be scheduled for permanent deletion in 30 days, and you'll be signed out on every device. Sign in again before then to cancel. Delete your account?
